untranslatable_reason: Signal requires external classification model predictions (model_prediction_up/down, model_confidence, model_confidence_margin) which are not available in the allowed indicators list. The backtest engine would need to integrate a trained classification model output as a custom data feed.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally depends on a machine learning classification model's probability outputs. The logic structure (probability threshold >= 80%, confidence margin >= 15%) is clear and translatable as condition logic, but the actual predictions require external model integration beyond standard technical indicators. The direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT because entry signals can be generated for either long or short based on the model's directional classification.
